operator_rule: Hold optimistic receipt posture and repair route truth before any dispatch attempt.
Transport acceptance may advance internal settlement but may not claim patient delivery.
Publish calm receipt posture only after authoritative delivery evidence is appended.
Retry on the bounded backoff schedule without minting a second communication envelope.
Escalate to recovery-required and stop retry once the provider rejects the transport.
Record failure evidence and keep the receipt bridge honest about unresolved delivery.
Disputed delivery must fail closed and hold support review open.
Expired evidence is terminal for this envelope and requires recovery posture instead of a calm success claim.
